landing.pillBadge: Control your expenses, set financial goals, and calculate zakat — all in one place
landing.smartWalletDesc: An integrated financial system that tracks your expenses and guides you toward your financial goals
landing.statsDesc: Live statistics showing how Meyaar helps you achieve your financial goals
landing.faqDesc: Everything you need to know about Meyaar in one place
landing.footerTagline: Designed carefully for smarter financial management

faq.a1: Meyaar is a personal budgeting app that helps you track your expenses, set financial goals, and calculate zakat — everything in one place with a smooth design.
faq.a2: Yes, Meyaar is completely free. You can create an account and start immediately without any fees or subscriptions.
faq.a3: Meyaar relies on calculating the Islamic nisab based on updated gold prices, and automatically calculates the zakat due from your savings at 2.5%.
faq.a4: Your data is fully encrypted during transmission and storage. We use the latest security technologies to protect your financial privacy.
faq.q5: Can I use it on mobile?
faq.a5: Absolutely! Meyaar is designed to work seamlessly on all devices — mobile, tablet, and laptop — with a fully responsive experience.

zakatPage.title: Zakat Calculator
zakatPage.subtitle: Calculate your zakat easily according to Sharia
zakatPage.banner: ✨ Your zakat is a blessing in your wealth ✨
zakatPage.infoText: 💡 Zakat is a pillar of Islam. It is obligatory on every Muslim whose wealth reaches the nisab ({{grams}} grams of gold ≈ {{value}}) and a complete lunar year has passed.
zakatPage.shariahText: Zakat is obligatory on wealth when it reaches the nisab (equivalent to {{grams}} grams of gold = {{value}}) and a complete Islamic year passes. Zakat rate is 2.5% of total wealth.
zakatPage.source: Source: Kuwait Encyclopedia of Islamic Jurisprudence, Zakat Section
zakatPage.reminderSet: You'll be reminded of the next zakat date ⭐
zakatPage.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero
